title: Suggestion about Shin Preview in Q
display_title: Suggestion about Shin Preview in Q
wikitext:
[]: Suggestion about Shin Preview in Q             Quote Post by EscapismIsBad » Fri Jan 01, 2021 11:04 pm I suggest the Shin preview in Q is actually a precursor (early draft) of a scene which will actually be present in Shin and we may have even seen it in the trailers. So, what's happening in the Shin Preview? We see Unit 8+2 fighting Mass Produced Evangelion (maybe even thousands) similar to Mark 6 in a red wasteland close to the Black Moon (which is somehow related to the impacts) utilizing a really effective weapon What do we see in the trailers which is indeed similar to Shin preview? We see Unit 8 and Unit 2 fighting Mass Produced Evangelion (maybe even thousands) similar to Mark 1Ø in a completely different place such as the Fifth Impact (which such changes are expected in the final product and exemplifies how unfinished Shin Preview really is) utilizing a really effective weapon. There is indeed a lot of similarities which I think are worth discussing and I'm really curious about what the others think... next I would like to discuss the possible relationship between Rei, the Dummy Plugs, Mark 1Ø and the Mass Produced Evangelion, but it's worth another topic!

[]: Re: Suggestion about Shin Preview in Q             Quote Post by FXArmaros98 » Thu Jan 14, 2021 11:38 am I fear that the Eva 08 + 02 is to be considered a discarded idea. In recent years Anno may have made changes to the original 3.0 + 1.0 storyline. Let us remember that in the Storyboards of 2.0 there was only one Adam and Rei II should have died like in the Ep 23 but then in the movie we saw a whole other story.

[]: Re: Suggestion about Shin Preview in Q             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Jan 14, 2021 11:52 am The Avant's mention of "Overlap Capability" and the use of that term in Ultraman leaves the possibility of some form of 08+02 on the table. It's too much of a Chekov Gun not to be fired at the climax.

[]: Re: Suggestion about Shin Preview in Q             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Jan 14, 2021 12:18 pm The movie has been rumored to be up to 2 hours long. With a duration that long, I doubt the climax is gonna be a mere 5 - 10 minutes. The climax might have a long runtime with a lot of ups and downs.

[]: Re: Suggestion about Shin Preview in Q             Quote Post by Heaven Piercing Man » Thu Jan 14, 2021 12:35 pm FXArmaros98 wrote: I fear that the Eva 08 + 02 is to be considered a discarded idea. In recent years Anno may have made changes to the original 3.0 + 1.0 storyline. Let us remember that in the Storyboards of 2.0 there was only one Adam and Rei II should have died like in the Ep 23 but then in the movie we saw a whole other story.

[]: Re: Suggestion about Shin Preview in Q             Quote Post by FXArmaros98 » Thu Jan 14, 2021 2:22 pm Heaven Piercing Man There were a lot of interesting things in those storyboards, some of them were discarded ideas about Mari, I don't remember very well but I think a staff member designed her to be a Tsundere, thinks she should have replaced Asuka for the Anta Baka and that even after having a conversation with Shinji who would replace the one with Kaji in the watermelon field of ep.19 she would kiss Shinji to convince him to fight against Zeruel / 10th Angel. Another interesting thing concerned Kaworu, after stopping the Near Third Impact he would have manually extracted the entry plug of the Eva 01 and Gendo would have commented on his arrival with this sentence: he has arrived. If you think about it this makes Kaworu an even more ambiguous character in the 3.0 preview we were shown descending into terminal dogma piloting the Mark 06 .. I'm too curious for a future release of the 3.0 + 1.0 storyboards. We don't know when the movie will come out, but after seeing it find out what the original plot ideas were and see if they were similar to the ones discarded for the anime will be very interesting.

[]: Re: Suggestion about Shin Preview in Q             Quote Post by Heaven Piercing Man » Thu Jan 14, 2021 3:16 pm Another interesting thing concerned Kaworu, after stopping the Near Third Impact he would have manually extracted the entry plug of the Eva 01 and Gendo would have commented on his arrival with this sentence: he has arrived.

[]: Re: Suggestion about Shin Preview in Q             Quote Post by FXArmaros98 » Thu Jan 14, 2021 4:14 pm Heaven Piercing Man I know, Kaworu in Rebuild is a truly ambiguous character he claiming to be the first Angel and then the 13th whatever that means, but until now it has not yet been said if he is one of the 4 Adams. Is it possible that Kaworu being the first Angel, the first form of life with Human DNA could actually be just like Adam in the Bible in practice the first man, or rather the common ancestor between angels and humans?

[]: Re: Suggestion about Shin Preview in Q             Quote Post by Blockio » Thu Jan 14, 2021 5:25 pm "The first Angel" is Adam. Or in this case, one of the four Adams.

[]: Re: Suggestion about Shin Preview in Q             Quote Post by EscapismIsBad » Thu Jan 14, 2021 7:57 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: The movie has been rumored to be up to 2 hours long. With a duration that long, I doubt the climax is gonna be a mere 5 - 10 minutes. The climax might have a long runtime with a lot of ups and downs.

[]: Re: Suggestion about Shin Preview in Q             Quote Post by Jäeger » Fri Jan 15, 2021 2:23 am EscapismIsBad wrote: FreakyFilmFan4ever#906622 wrote: The movie has been rumored to be up to 2 hours long. With a duration that long, I doubt the climax is gonna be a mere 5 - 10 minutes. The climax might have a long runtime with a lot of ups and downs.
